blog.comingSoon: We are preparing interesting articles about food, wines and life in Trenčín.

about.label: About us
about.title: The taste of the sea in the heart of Trenčín
about.text: Adriano Restaurant & Cafe brings authentic Mediterranean cuisine with fresh seafood, homemade pasta and wines directly from Istria and Croatia. Since 2015 we have been a place where friends, families and lovers of good food come together.

items.text: Fantastic grilled octopus! Best restaurant in Trenčín.
items.author: Mária K.

items.text: Bavette Fruti di Mare was perfect. I will definitely come back!
items.author: Peter S.

items.text: Great service, excellent wine from Istria. Atmosphere like in Croatia.
items.author: Jana M.

items.text: The lobster was fresh and perfectly prepared. I recommend it to everyone!
items.author: Tomáš B.

chobotnica.name: Grilled Octopus
chobotnica.desc: Grilled octopus with lemon and olive oil

meta.title: Adriano – Restaurant & Cafe Trenčín
